params.name: Elephant Bird Egg
params.description: It is the egg of an extinct giant bird species, the elephant bird. It is as big as several hundred chicken eggs. A complete skeleton of a young elephant bird is preserved inside of it. It is a once-in-a-lifetime rarity.
